name: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. (The) Depositary Share repstg 1/1000th Preferred Series C
summary: The Goldman Sachs Group Inc. Depositary Share repstg 1/1000th Preferred Series C represents a fractional ownership in a series of preferred stock issued by Goldman Sachs. These preferred shares have specific features defined in the series C designation. As a depositary share, it simplifies trading and ownership of the underlying preferred stock.
